attributes.description: Alerts when average CPU utilization is sustained above a threshold. Latency rises sharply above ~80% CPU; correlate with SwapUsage for memory-related CPU pressure.
attributes.name: [AWS RDS OTel] CPU utilization high

investigation_guide.blob:
## CPU Utilization High

### Triage
1. Check `SwapUsage` — swapping can inflate CPU and latency.
2. Review `DatabaseConnections` for connection storms driving CPU.
3. Inspect slow query logs or Performance Insights for expensive queries (out of scope for this rule).
4. On T-family instances, verify CPU credit balance if credit metrics are collected.

### Mitigation
- Optimize top CPU-consuming queries (indexes, query rewrite).
- Scale up instance class or add read replicas.
- Reduce connection count and idle sessions.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.rds.otel-*
| WHERE Namespace == "AWS/RDS"
    AND MetricName == "CPUUtilization"
    AND stat == "Average"
| STATS avg_cpu_utilization = AVG(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`)
    BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region
// Percent CPU — adjust threshold (default: 80%)
| WHERE avg_cpu_utilization > 80.0
| SORT avg_cpu_utilization DESC
